name: Resume Shortlisting Agent
description: Automates resume parsing, candidate scoring against job requirements, filtering top candidates, and scheduling interviews via email.

skills.name: extract_job_role
skills.description: Extract the job role from user input

skills.name: generate_required_skills
skills.description: Generate a list of required skills for a given job role

skills.name: read_spreadsheet
skills.description: Read candidate data from a spreadsheet URL

skills.name: download_resume
skills.description: Download a resume from a given URL

skills.name: extract_resume_text
skills.description: Extract text content from a PDF resume

skills.name: extract_resume_details
skills.description: Extract structured details (name, email, skills, experience) from resume text

skills.name: score_candidate
skills.description: Score a candidate against required skills for a job role

skills.name: filter_candidates
skills.description: Filter and rank candidates by score, returning the top shortlisted candidates

skills.name: schedule_interview
skills.description: Schedule an interview for a shortlisted candidate

skills.name: send_interview_email
skills.description: Send an interview invitation email to a candidate
